languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

languages.text: "Ты о том, как выглядят их попытки жить в гармонии с окружающей их природой? Что ж. Это и вправду забавно. И жалко".
"Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

languages.text: 「自然と調和して生きるようにしているように見える彼らの生き方のことですか。そう、それは本当に可笑しい。そして哀れな」
languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

traits.locale_text: 「自然と調和して生きるようにしているように見える彼らの生き方のことですか。そう、それは本当に可笑しい。そして哀れな。」

languages.text: « Parlez-vous de la manière dont ils semblent essayer de vivre en harmonie avec leur environnement naturel ? Comme vous le dites, c'est sincèrement amusant. Et pitoyable. »
languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

traits.locale_text: « Parlez-vous de la manière dont ils semblent essayer de vivre en harmonie avec leur environnement naturel ? Comme vous le dites, c'est sincèrement amusant. Et pitoyable. »

languages.text: "Meint Ihr damit, dass sie offenbar versuchen, in Harmonie mit ihrer natürlichen Umgebung zu leben? Tja. Das ist wirklich amüsant. Und erbärmlich."
languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

traits.locale_text: "Meint Ihr damit, dass sie offenbar versuchen, in Harmonie mit ihrer natürlichen Umgebung zu leben? Tja. Das ist wirklich amüsant. Und erbärmlich."

languages.text: "Doğal çevreleriyle uyum içinde yaşamaya çalışmalarını mı kastediyorsun? Eh. Bu gerçekten eğlenceli. Ve acınası."
languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

traits.locale_text: "Doğal çevreleriyle uyum içinde yaşamaya çalışmalarını mı kastediyorsun? Eh. Bu gerçekten eğlenceli. Ve acınası."

languages.text: «¿Te refieres al modo en que intentan vivir en armonía con la naturaleza? Pues lo encuentro genuinamente divertido. Y penoso».
languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

traits.locale_text: «¿Te refieres al modo en que intentan vivir en armonía con la naturaleza? Pues lo encuentro genuinamente divertido. Y penoso».

languages.text: “你说的是他们那看似试图与自然和谐共处的生活方式？好吧，那确实可笑，还很可悲。”
languages.original_text: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."

traits.locale_text: “你说的是他们那看似试图与自然和谐共处的生活方式？好吧，那确实可笑，还很可悲。”
